send_to_cs: Send to CS immediately if cx did not receive their order
Send to CS immediately for post purchase inquiries about the status of the mold, or issues with the molds
Send to CS for pricing inquiries
Send to CS if cx is looking for a more specific piece not available on the website
Send to CS if cx is asking for a code and we don't have one
escalate: No escalations for this client, send everything to CS
tone: Use Teeth instead of Pieces (e.g 8 teeth at the top)
templates: If the image is not coming through a second time, send Broken Image temp
For CUSTOM GRILLZ & ACCESSORIES INQUIRIES for models not available on the website use PS shortcut
For urgent concerns/delayed escalation response use PS shortcut
For delayed orders and the customer is frustrated use PS shortcut
For customer service use shortcut CS which has both the direct email/number
dos_and_donts: Do not use the order history as a reference to order status
If customers want to cancel their order always ask for the reason for cancellation
drive_to_purchase: Don't recommend pre-made grillz! Upsell to fitted and custom grillz
When recommending an item, let the cx know they can customize their order on the product page
When recommending an item, ask the cx if they are working with a budget
Use LFG shortcut to gather information and provide recommendations when cx ask about:

Help
Custom Gold Grillz: Hi there! My name is Jordan, how can I help?
I want to pre order the mold and have it fitted
Custom Gold Grillz: Are you looking for the Replacement Molding Kit For Custom-made Grillz here? https://customgoldgrillz.attn.tv/sl/39xDFhWA
No I never ordered anything I would love to purchase the mold and send for a custom made grill
Custom Gold Grillz: I'm glad that you liked our products. I'm sorry but what do you mean by "send for a custom made grill"?
Do you mail the molds out

Custom Gold Grillz: Yes, the mold will be mailed to you. We usually ship via USPS every business day at 2pm PST. For our custom-made grillz, the production time is 1-2 weeks for Solid Style Grillz and 2-3 weeks for Iced Out Grillz not including the shipping of the molding kits (back and forth) and finished piece. Overall the timeframe could vary but should be around 3-4 weeks. For our pre-made grillz, once they're shipped it'll take 3-5 business days domestically. Hope this helps. Let me know if you have further questions.
Perfect
Thank you

Custom Gold Grillz: You're welcome! Have a great evening and if you have any questions, feel free to shoot me a text.

In the meantime, feel free to check out our best-selling jewelry collection. Maybe you'll find something you like!
https://customgoldgrillz.attn.tv/sl/ymwdGZbs

Order #25455001 placed on 10/1/2024I ordered two sizes and kept medium large and went to return the XL size and says ineligible.  No where did it say this when I was ordering!!! Please send me a return label and credit when xl comes back.

Halloween Costumes: I'm sorry to hear about the issue with your return. If you are returning an item due to a size issue, please make sure to check the costume itself rather than relying solely on the label on the outside packaging. It's not uncommon for manufacturers to use the same labeling for different sizes, and sometimes the costume size may be CORRECT even if the package labeling is not.

You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://halloweencostumes.attn.tv/aKQ_JozrF4bb/

I ordered two sizes the smaller one fits I wanted to return the large and it says it's ineligible.  Nothing when I ordered it say it wasn't returnable.  I went through your return process and it would not let me return the bigger size.  I will never order from you guys again. It is an $80 costume.  Ridiculous I can't return it for full credit.

Halloween Costumes: I apologize for the inconvenience. I'd love to help, but my access is limited. Could you please send me a photo of the items you received, along with your order number and email address? Thank you!
Order # is in picture. Kept medium needed to return larger size. Jennifer.texer@allergan.com

Halloween Costumes: Thanks for the screenshot, may you please submit the return here: https://halloweencostumes.attn.tv/a-76DY86jSC0

If you'll get a message that is unable to return, please take a screenshot and attach it here.
